form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since he finished last of 7 at Saint-Cloud in the G3 Prix De Conde October 3 over 2000m, soft track; 6 len behind Waybreaker carrying 57kg at $3.10. On debut fifth of 8 at Haydock Park May 30 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Morris Dancer carrying 60.5kg at $11. Will need to do even more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). Resuming. On debut fifth of 8 at Haydock Park May 30 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Morris Dancer carrying 60.5kg at $11. Will need to do even more.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 60-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 14 at Riyadh Dirt in the SAUG3 SAUG3 SAUDI DERBY on February 14 over 1600m, 50 len behind Al Haram with 57kg at $13. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Haydock Park in the LR Ascendant Stakes on September 6 over 1640m, 2.75 len behind Bow Echo carrying 59kg at $11. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Second-up. Comes off a 60-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 14 at Riyadh Dirt in the SAUG3 SAUG3 SAUDI DERBY on February 14 over 1600m, 50 len behind Al Haram with 57kg at $13. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Haydock Park in the LR Ascendant Stakes on September 6 over 1640m, 2.75 len behind Bow Echo carrying 59kg at $11. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at Chantilly All Weather in the G3 Prix Thomas Bryon November 18 over 1800m, a head behind Al Zanati carrying 57kg at $9.20. On debut tenth of 18 at Newbury May 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind Humidity carrying 60.5kg at $81. Not keen on his chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Resumes from a spell. On debut tenth of 18 at Newbury May 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind Humidity carrying 60.5kg at $81. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Colt back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 10 at Saint-Cloud in the G1 Criterium de Saint-Cloud October 26 over 2000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Pierre Bonnard with 57kg at $22. First up last campaign fifth of 16 at Longchamp October 4 over 1600m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Cape Orator carrying 57kg at $3.10. Tough to beat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

First up last campaign fifth of 16 at Longchamp October 4 over 1600m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Cape Orator carrying 57kg at $3.10. Tough to beat on best form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since winning by neck York October 11 over 1590m defeating Arabian Desert with 60.5kg at $4.30. On debut second in a small field at Sandown Park September 17 over 1400m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Esna carrying 60.5kg at $1.90. Must respect.

formComments.title: TAB

On debut second in a small field at Sandown Park September 17 over 1400m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Esna carrying 60.5kg at $1.90. Must respect.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign winning to post a big 5 len win. Goodwood October 12 over 1800m defeating Edwin Hubble with 60.5kg at $1.40. On debut second of 9 at Haydock Park September 27 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Lost Boys with 58kg at $7.50. Progress likely and can play a big role.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won won by 14 len at Newcastle All Weather March 21 over 1600m defeating Showcasing Star carrying 60.5kg at $2.30. In form and expected to measure up again.
